triggers: Financial logic — P&L calculations, position sizing, hard-stop and trailing-stop arithmetic must be exact
External broker API credentials — Fyers and Angel One secrets in .env require hygiene guards
Broker WebSocket data ingestion — malformed external data must not crash the process
TimescaleDB financial time-series integrity — hypertable write patterns and time-range filter discipline

scope_notes.pricing_reviewer: NOT APPLICABLE — no billing, no tiers, no Stripe (business.md)
scope_notes.auth_risk_flag: NOT APPLICABLE — no user authentication, no sessions, no PII (business.md)
scope_notes.security_focus: Secrets management (Fyers/Angel One credentials, .env hygiene) and safe broker WebSocket handling
